summary: Formalize and validate live Hermes proof artifacts
description: The WSL handoff names go-workflow.live-hermes-proof.v1 but no schema or reusable validator currently exists, so copied proof cannot be independently checked.
acceptance: A versioned JSON schema and importable validator reject incomplete or not-proven artifacts
The CLI validates a proof file and can copy only a valid proof to an explicit output
The live campaign self-validates proof.json before printing PROVEN

evidence.summary: TDD RED proved missing proof command, naive timestamp acceptance, unchecked hashes, malformed nested crash, and semantically empty raw results; GREEN provides packaged schema, importable validator, CLI copy gate, raw hash and doctor/run/protocol reconstruction. Verification: 70 pytest tests, make check, check-pilots, fail-closed missing-Hermes gate, and git diff check passed.
